events.title: Dean Delray
events.description: Delray has been a fan of comedy from his early years, taking in work of the greats like Richard Pryor, George Carlin, Cheech and Chong and the early Saturday Night Live gang. events.title: 1st Sunday Of The Month Open Mic Comedy Festival
events.description: We’ve got traveling headliners, first time performers, and everything in between. Lively and quick moving show, come see how the sausage gets made with new material being the order of the day. events.title: Stand-Up Comedy Class Graduation Showcase
events.description: A night of fresh faces, fearless comedy, and first-time funny! After six weeks of writing, rehearsing, and workshopping their material, the students from our Stand-Up Comedy Class — led by comedian and instructor Yoshee So — are taking the stage for the very first time to deliver their own original sets. events.title: Trivia with The Robys
events.description: Trivia Night with hosts The Robys. Join them every Thursday night at Glover Park in Marietta for the most unforgettable trivia experience this side of the Chattahoochee! They aren’t your average hosts! They are a dynamic duo bringing laughs, killer playlists, and next-level energy to your weeknight.

events.title: Danny Polishchuk
events.description: Danny Polishchuk is a comedian, writer and actor who is known for hit viral sketches which have amassed over a billion views online. He co-hosts the Boyscast with comedian Ryan Long and hosts the weekly call-in shows Low Value Mail and The Bath House. events.title: Fairytale Friday
events.description: Come to the Garden dressed as a favorite fairytale character, fairies, dragons, knights, princesses, witches and wizards. Starting at 11 a.m. in the Children’s Garden, enjoy a fairytale parade filled with music and bubbles. This event is free with Garden admission. Schedule: April 10, May 8, June 12, and July 10, (the second Friday of the month April – July)

events.title: Brent Morin
events.description: Brent is a Los Angeles-based American comedian, stand-up comic, actor and writer. He was a panelist in the sixth season of Chelsea Lately and played Justin Kearney on the NBC sitcom Undateable and the agent Hobbs on the sci-fi web-series Crunch Time, on Rooster Teeth. In 2015, Morin released his stand-up comedy show, I’m Brent Morin, exclusively on Netflix.

events.title: Juneteenth Cultural Festival
events.description: Organized by the Cobb County Branch NAACP in partnership with the City of Marietta, this annual celebration honors the enduring pursuit of freedom, unity, and progress that continues to shape our nation. Commemorating the emancipation of enslaved people in the United States, the event brings the community together through education, culture, and connection.

events.title: RobertKent Galleries Artisan Market
events.description: The Artisan Market at RobertKent Galleries, part of our ongoing monthly market series highlighting local artists and makers. They aren’t your average hosts! They are a dynamic duo bringing laughs, killer playlists, and next-level energy to your weeknight.

events.title: Marietta Square Art Walk
events.description: Shop, dine, and grab a drink for a stroll around the Square each First Friday of the month. Art Walk is a free self-guided walking tour that celebrates the vitality of Marietta’s diverse cultural Arts scene, showcasing local artists throughout Marietta Square.

events.title: Welcome to Atlanta
events.description: @ Reserve Your FREE Ticket Ticket Whether you’re a lifelong Atlanta resident or a first-time visitor, join us on Friday, July 3 , from 6:30pm-9:30pm for a sample of all things Atlanta! We’re closing out Civic Season and our 250th observances this year with a Welcome to Atlanta party – featuring a DJ, community resources from across the city, books and mercha

events.title: Independence Eve Concert
events.description: Marietta Parks, Recreation & Facilities announces that Atlanta’s own Drivin N Cryin will headline the City’s Independence Eve Concert on Friday, July 3, from 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM on the historic Marietta Square. The concert kicks off Marietta’s beloved Fourth in the Park weekend and is part of the community’s celebration of America’s 250th anniversary. Formed

events.title: Marietta Square Artisan Market
events.description: An open air showcase of locally made art. Every Saturday on Mill Street.

events.title: Marietta Square Farmers Market
events.description: The market has an average of 64 vendors and hundreds of customers each week. Market customers have lots of variety to choose from including heirloom tomatoes, fruits and vegetables that are rarely, if ever, available from the grocery store. events.title: City of Marietta’s 4th in the Park Celebration
events.description: The City of Marietta’s 4th In The Park Celebration includes a morning parade, an all-day arts and crafts show, food, carnival games, plus an evening concert featuring Departure, and fireworks finale. events.title: City Winery Tour + Tasting
events.description: Uncover the secrets of Atlanta’s only urban winery with our resident sommelier! Every Saturday at 3pm, take an exclusive tour of City Winery Atlanta and learn about our winemaking journey — from grape to glass. events.title: Timba on the Shed
events.description: Enjoy an afternoon of non-stop Cuban music with a touch of bachata, perfect for dancing and connecting with friends. The fun starts at 5PM with a free salsa lesson, followed by music until around 8PM. Join us at Ponce City Market’s Shed, right by the BeltLine. This event happens every first Saturday of the month, so bring your friends and let’s dance!

events.title: Fantastic Fourth Celebration
events.description: Stone Mountain Park's week-long Independence Day celebration with attractions, live entertainment, and a nightly 250th Celebration Drone & Light Show at 9:30 PM followed by a fireworks finale.

events.title: Ladies Night Happy Hour
events.description: Every Monday night is Happy Hour 🍷 Charcuterie board and wine for 15$

events.title: Atlanta Run Club
events.description: Every week on The Yard. Open to all levels. Walking is welcome. Regular communication regarding run details can be found on our Discord & Instagram.

events.title: Industry Night
events.description: All fellow bartenders join us for 20% off your tab.

events.title: Ladies Night
events.description: Ladies Night in the Speakeasy! Join them for their Girl Dinner special, including your choice of a small plate, a half salad, and a martini for $30. Show your host that you’re following them on Instagram for entry to the secret Speakeasy.

events.title: Fairytale Friday
events.description: Come to the Garden dressed as a favorite fairytale character, fairies, dragons, knights, princesses, witches and wizards. Starting at 11 a.m. in the Children’s Garden, enjoy a fairytale parade filled with music and bubbles. This event is free with Garden admission. Schedule: April 10, May 8, June 12, and July 10, (the second Friday of the month April – July)

events.title: Friday Night Live Music at Church Street Park
events.description: From June through October, the Church Street development is bringing local singer-songwriters and jazz combos to Church Street Park for an evening of live music under the open sky, one Friday a month from 6-8 p.m. No tickets. No cover. Just good music and good company. Bring a blanket, bring a chair, bring an entire picnic dinner! This is a recurring series.

events.title: RobertKent Galleries Artisan Market
events.description: The Artisan Market at RobertKent Galleries, part of our ongoing monthly market series highlighting local artists and makers. Expect approximately 15–20 artisans’ goods with a curated mix of jewelry, ceramics, glasswork, woodwork, metalwork, small paintings, works on paper, and small-scale sculpture.
